entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop variety being tested for grain yield across different sites.

entities.name: SEQRET PATTERN ANALYSIS
entities.description: A sequential retrospective pattern analysis used to stratify testing sites based on similarity.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural trait used to discriminate between genotypes across different environments.

entities.name: MULTI-ENVIRONMENT TRIALS
entities.description: Experimental trials conducted across multiple locations to evaluate crop performance.

entities.name: SADC REGION
entities.description: The Southern African Development Community region where the testing sites are located.

entities.name: GENOTYPES
entities.description: The different genetic variations of sorghum varieties being evaluated.

entities.name: SITE STRATIFICATION
entities.description: The process of clustering testing sites into groups based on their similarity for yield discrimination.
